reviews.name: elroy dewitt
reviews.text:
My experience with Dr Dianne at Smile Dental is a delightful experience and she has been my dentist for the past 8 years
.
Dianne is really professional to address all our fears before any procedures especially the injections on your gums.

Her advice on dental is thorough that will give you the peace of mind that you are in good hands

I recommend Dianne anytime erradicating all fears with the best dental treatment that we need

reviews.name: Hamshyaleykha
reviews.text:
Desperately needed a wisdom tooth extraction ASAP and thankfully my friend recommended Smile Partners Dental Clinic!

Consultation was quick yet informative and thorough.

Wisdom tooth extraction procedure was completely painless and worry-free! Dr.Diane is amazing at her craft and she's the absolute sweetest. I mentioned my fear of needles and she took precautions to keep me distracted and calm throughout the whole procedure.

Would definitely visit Smile Partners Dental Clinic again for future check-up or any procedures!

Oh and not to mention, the extraction fee didn't break the bank!

reviews.name: Chng
reviews.text:
I had a freak accident, fell with my face down on a walking path. Had quite a few chipped teeth and one came out completely in the frontal jaw. My teeth were badly damaged. I was referred to Dr. Diane Chai of Smile Partners.
Dr Chai was very professional, personal and patient taking time to explain the options and her recommended treatment. She was also very thorough yet gentle in the way she went about treating me. I so appreciate Dr. Diane going out of her way to make sure what was needed to be addressed and that it was done timely and well. The bridge and crowns done were a perfect fit and I appreciate her following up after each treatment. We highly recommend Dr. Diane!!

reviews.name: Rowena Chan
reviews.text: Dr Diane was a v good, dedicated, thorough dentist that didn’t take short cuts in fixing my many teeth that other dentist had done recently. Highly recommended to go to her as her experience is more than 30yrs. Her sincerity will not disappoint you.

reviews.text:
I was reluctant to visit a dental clinic I wasn’t familiar with, but it turned out to be a great experience. 👍🏻

The doctor was professional and friendly, providing only what was necessary instead of pushing unnecessary services for sales.
This will definitely be my go-to dental clinic from now on. Oh and they will send you soft copy of MC & receipts, good for lazy people like me 😂

reviews.name: Viktor Emeljanov
reviews.text:
I had the pleasure of being treated by Alice, during my visit.

A bit about myself: I travel a lot and have been to dentists in Australia, Dubai, Germany, Thailand, and Malaysia. So, I’ve experienced a wide range of quality. To be honest, I didn’t have high expectations going in, but Alice absolutely exceeded them. Her professional dental cleaning was truly world-class.

She was incredibly diligent, skilled, and clearly a master in her field. I have veneers, which makes my teeth more sensitive, but she handled everything with such precision and care, something other dentists in places like Dubai and Germany couldn’t quite achieve. She simply nailed it.

I’m genuinely impressed. If I return to Kuala Lumpur, I’ll definitely come back to this clinic. I sincerely hope Alice will still be there, I’d love to be treated by her again. I wish her and her assistant all the very best, and I send my warmest regards to the entire clinic.

reviews.name: Matthias Lissner
reviews.text: Very professional and friendly service, both for adults and children! Very happy here so far!

title: Clarity Dental Clinic
address: No. 21-P1, Block B, Jaya One, 72A, Jln Profesor Diraja Ungku Aziz, Jalan Universiti, 46200 Petaling Jaya, Selangor, Malaysia

reviews.name: May Chiam
reviews.text:
我有一个困扰了很久的问题。

三年前，我总觉得自己的呼吸通道特别“空”，而且闻到的气味都特别浓烈。慢慢地，我开始闻到一些奇怪的臭味，有时像 longkang（沟渠）的味道，有时又像臭鸡蛋味。口气也变得很重，不管是漱口还是使用 Marvis 牙膏，都没有改善。

前几天本来只是陪儿子去做牙套，想着顺便洗个牙。在填写病历表时，我把自己长期有 sinus 的问题写了出来。

见到 Ryan 医生时，虽然我没有预约，但刚好他有空，也刚好成了我的贵人。他听完我的情况后，建议我先做扫描检查。报告出来后，他向我详细解释问题所在，并建议进行 OAF Repair 手术。

他刷新了我对 sinus 的认知。我一直以为 sinus 问题是跟“鼻子”有关，从来没有想过竟然会跟“牙齿”有关。当时的我其实很惊讶，但看着他专业而细心的分析，我选择相信他。

隔天由 Benjie 医生主刀。他的专业和丰富知识让我信心大增。整个手术过程比我想象中轻松许多，不但没有太大的痛苦，而且他的动作快、准、稳，让人非常安心。

手术后我一直感觉良好。几天过去，我明显感觉那个“空洞感”已经消失了，鼻腔里的臭味也淡了许多。

今天回诊拆线时，帅气的 Benjie 医生告诉我，我长期困扰的鼻炎情况已经改善了！听到那一刻真的很开心，也更加庆幸自己当初选择相信 Ryan 医生的判断，并接受治疗。短短几天的改变，让我重新感受到正常呼吸的舒服和自在。

感恩遇到 Ryan 和 Benjie 医生，感谢他们的专业、耐心和帮助，让我终于找到问题的根源，也重新找回舒服自在的呼吸感觉。🙏❤️

最后想分享一下，Clarity Dental Clinic 其实是我在 Google 上偶然找到的。坦白说，价格确实不算便宜，但经过这次治疗后，我觉得他们的专业、细心和服务绝对对得起这个价钱。能够真正找出问题并解决多年困扰，对我来说是非常值得的。❤️

reviews.name: menglu su
reviews.text: Dr.Eddy太棒了！他很耐心，温柔，从来这个牙科诊所之后再也不怕见牙医了，他们的服务非常好！Dr.Sonia做的压冠很美，很爱笑。在这里做牙齿治疗很放心！

reviews.name: Cat Life
reviews.text: The environment is pleasant, and the staff is professional and hygienic. ⭐️ Most importantly, they effectively resolved my dental concerns, including veneer treatment, teeth whitening, dental check-ups, retainers, and smile line design.

reviews.name: Hann
reviews.text:
Experienced, friendly, and genuinely caring. I’ve been seeing Dr. Sonia at this clinic, and she is truly one of a kind.

I’ve tried a few dental clinics before, but after stumbling upon this place, I’ve been coming back consistently for years. The overall experience has always been pleasant, and the team is warm and welcoming.

If Dr. Sonia’s name sounds familiar, it may be because she was interviewed by Mr. Money TV. Highly recommended!

reviews.name: YE WANG
reviews.text: Had two fillings done by Dr. Eddy and the whole experience was excellent. The procedure was completely painless. Dr. Eddy was very professional and took the time to explain everything clearly

reviews.name: Na ia
reviews.text:
I went to Dr Sonia and honestly she’s one of the nicest dentists I’ve been to. She’s really careful with everything she does and keeps checking in so you don’t feel lost or tense.

It didn’t hurt at all, and she was super gentle the whole time, which made a huge difference for me.

She also explains things in a very calm way, like nothing feels rushed or stressful. You can tell she actually cares about making sure you’re okay, not just getting the job done. I’d definitely go back to her again!!!

reviews.name: Tom Ball
reviews.text: I had a titanium implant to replace a broken front tooth. Prof Ong did the procedure for me and the treatment and care was first class. On top of that the pricing was more competitive than in some other KL clinics. After care also excellent. Thank you Prof Ong!

reviews.name: Ijaykay
reviews.text:
I urgently needed to have a broken tooth removed and some fillings done, and I’m very glad I found this dental clinic in Damansara Uptown. It’s conveniently located on Level 2 of the Uptown 37 building, right beside HSBC. Street parking can be challenging, but you can easily park at Starling Mall, just use the exit near Nando’s for quick access.

I highly recommend Dr. Jackie. He is patient, knowledgeable, and genuinely cares for his patients. He’s honest, confident in his work, and provides clear, helpful suggestions and advice. He takes his time with every procedure and is very gentle throughout.

I truly can’t thank Dr. Jackie enough for what he did. An excellent experience overall.

reviews.text:
FANTASTIC EXPERIENCE!
Went for my regular check up away from my home town and my colleague suggested this clinic.
So happy with the way my scaling and filling was done. NO pain at all.
Want to thank Dr. Sharmila for attending to me patiently and gently despite having many patients waiting.

reviews.name: Cynthia Chee
reviews.text: Had my braces done here. All the staff are very friendly and Dr Sharmila is very experienced, she explains the process in detail and being very gentle to patients.

reviews.name: Shannon Lam
reviews.text: Bad management and service. Did braces for 2 years and made appointments for every month yet on the actual day, I still have to wait for at least 30minutes and sometimes even up to 90minutes. The dentist was not serious of the entire procedure and even asked me when do I want to remove my braces (am I the patient or dentist now?). Scaling was FOC as it was included in the braces package, however when I removed my braces and the doctor asked if I want to do scaling, I simply said yes. Later on she charged me RM80 as a "favour" where she claimed to mark down the price just for me. (My mother went there for scaling the other day and was charged RM80 too) favour? I think not. The doctor also convinced my parent if I were to do the braces, I would be very satisfied with the results but in the end when I asked about my overbite, the doctor said "this is the best we could do". The dentist who served me is a middle aged Indian women. Highly DO NOT recommend this dental clinic.

title: Procare Specialist Dental Clinic
address: 4, Jalan SS 21/1, Damansara Utama, 47400 Petaling Jaya, Selangor, Malaysia

reviews.name: BoonYang L.
reviews.text: Dr. Tan Ching Ching is the best orthodontist in town! She is very experienced, meticulous and astute in her field. I truly appreciate her professionalism and integrity and would highly recommend her!

reviews.name: KuanLeng Chan
reviews.text:
I was very well impressed by Dr Ong Wai Kit and Procare Dental Clinic during my check up. The equipment and process is very advanced.  I have never discussed my dental care using both a computer monitor and a plastic teeth model before!
Dr Ong was very professional and meticulous  and gave my teeth a very good check up, and explained future options for my dental care. Reasonable fees for the service rendered.
Recommended for anyone seeking good dental care.

reviews.name: CL C
reviews.text: My kids were treated by the very competent, thorough and friendly Dr Ong Wai Kit. He made it  a very positive experience for them for which I'm very thankful. Charges were also very reasonable. Highly recommended.

reviews.name: MD B
reviews.text: Dr. Chan is a veritable maestro of dental artistry. My implant is not merely a restoration, but a triumph of aesthetic and functional perfection. Dr. Chan, you have imbued me with renewed confidence. This outcome is a testament to your unparalleled expertise. Bravo!

reviews.name: Shufitri Mohd Shukardi
reviews.text:
I went to have scaling and a general checkup, and to check on why my gums feels pain. The doctor mentioned that it was nothing. So I had scaling which I paid RM300 for. I felt comfortable being there.

I needed a second opinion because it was still painful, so I went to PPUM they said I should get x-ray which showed I need to have my lower wisdom tooth extracted.

I wish that the doctor at Procare would listen to their patients when they say they are in pain.

title: Chuah Dental Clinic
address: 21A, Jalan 14/20, Seksyen 14, 46100 Petaling Jaya, Selangor, Malaysia

reviews.name: Jeffey Manuel
reviews.text: Ms Mg was amazing just like family and the doctors here extremely caring and professional, recommended to anyone looking for a great experience.

reviews.name: Evita Rosta
reviews.text: I had an excellent experience with Dr. Teh, Staff Fatin, and Staff Anis. The tooth extraction was virtually painless, and the team explained every procedure clearly beforehand. The services are reasonably priced. I highly recommend them and will definitely return for regular check-ups.👍

reviews.name: leix
reviews.text: I recently needed a filling for a cavity, and the experience here was excellent. The technique and service were superb, and the price was reasonable. As a foreigner, I had a fantastic experience and highly recommend it.国人牙齿有问题来这里很放心

reviews.name: Yong Xian Teoh
reviews.text: Had a checkup, clearly explanation & professional work

reviews.name: Leen Khoo
reviews.text:
Dr Chuah is an excellent dentist. Great communication and explains things well. My daughter felt safe in his hands. He’s also very gentle and scaling was completely pain and discomfort free.

The receptionist was also very friendly and super quick in replying messages/queries on WhatsApp.

title: SmileGram Dental Clinic PJ (Petaling Jaya)
address: First floor, No. 10A-2, Jalan 14/20, 46100 Petaling Jaya, Selangor, Malaysia

reviews.name: Bryant Sum
reviews.text: Doctor Chan is wonderful dentist,, which explains every step, and nurses as well assisting. Recommended to try

reviews.name: Adib Aiman
reviews.text: Dah 2 Kali scalling sini terima kasih doktor ramah2. Inshallah lepas ni consistent 6 bulan sekali scalling sini

reviews.name: N.F. Kyaissah Ariffin
reviews.text: Service dri Dr and nurses sangat friendly, warm and welcoming. Dtg utk buat denture utk ibu saya and Dr Syida was very attentive, jawab satu-satu soalan-soalan patient and explained very well. Thank you so much!

reviews.name: Izzati Zainal
reviews.text: Very recommended! The doctor was kind and gave clear explanations. The staff were friendly and helpful. I had my tooth extracted here and Dr Tan was very gentle and soft during the procedure. Thank you for the great experience! 😊

reviews.name: qurratuaini SH
reviews.text: Staff friendly, good treatment & comfort. Recommended place

reviews.name: hasmira hasanuddin
reviews.text: Doctor kat sini sangat baik dan soft sponken. Paling penting sini bracess paling murah. Dia scan sekali tau. Veru recommended dental ni. Thankyou doktor dan staff yang lain

title: Klinik Pergigian My Dental Care
address: B-11-G, Sunway Giza Mall, Jalan Pju 5/14, Dataran Sunway, Kota Damansara, 47810 Petaling Jaya, Selangor, Malaysia

reviews.name: Hairol Ezwan
reviews.text: Service terbaik dan layanan yang terbaik

reviews.name: Dolliey Liey
reviews.text:
Tolong tolong reply whatsapp. Susah betul nak follow up appointment braces saya, lagi-lagi bila klinik tak update bila jadual seterusnya. Appointment sebelum ni , selepas lebih seminggu saya whatsapp baru dapat maklumbalas , itupun selepas saya cakap nak walk-in terus sebab berkali² saya whatsapp tapi tak ada respons,  masa tu barulah cakap doct tak ada. Utk appointment bulan Jun ni dah nak masuk pertengahan bulan still no update, dah 3 hari saya tunggu reply.

Agak kecewa dengan pengurusan temujanji klinik, rawatan braces perlu pemantauan berkala, jadi minta tolong beri kerjasama memandangkan saya duduk jauh jarak perjalanan ke klinik ambil masa 40-50minit.

reviews.name: Phoebe khoo
reviews.text:
Experienced Dentist, handle my daughter well. But the appointment management are terrible. My daughter had her dental care since last year then we decided to have braces. From there the appointment arrangements are so messy and not convenient.
Keep changing time, changing branch as mom I'm not happy and not willing to keep changing time and location.
because doing braces need to follow up closely - monthly, I have no choice and to stick with the same dentist.
If I have a choice I want to change service and get another clinic to continue the treatment.

reviews.name: Shazlan Ikmal Shahriman
reviews.text: Brought my daughter for her 1st dental checkup. The facilities were good and the staff and doctor were very kind and supportive of my daughter

reviews.name: Kiki Loo
reviews.text: Extremely disappointed with the dentist. Not professional, not detailed, just simply cleaned my son’s teeth. Less than 2 minutes job, and wanted to charge us RM220. And when I checked my son’s teeth, the plaque still there.

reviews.name: suhana azhar
reviews.text: Sebelum ni bawa ank g klinik lain semua xnk menangis, tpi klinik terus anak nak and beri kerjasama...service serius terbaik

reviews.name: Hamizah Maiyidin
reviews.text: Been coming here since they first opened. Friendly staff, great doctors, and nice facilities. Highly recommended! 🌟

street: B-11-G, Sunway Giza Mall, Jalan Pju 5/14, Dataran Sunway
